text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho is over, and the<n>Japanese Derby
is fast approaching<n>when...

What is this? A "BNW Special<n>Feature"? What
does BNW mean?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it. It must stand for "Biwa<n>Hayahide,"
"Narita Taishin," and<n>"Winning Ticket."

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pfft. Talk about unimaginative.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin acts unimpressed, but<n>it's easy to
see the joy in her<n>expression.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Public opinion has completely<n>changed following
Narita Taishin's<n>impressive run in the Satsuki Sho.
The<n>era of the "top two" has ended, and<n>all focus
is now on the BNW trio!
choice_data_list:
Let's throw everything we've got at the
Japanese Derby!

Let's throw everything we've got at the
Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sure.

Can we end the meeting now? Cool,<n>I'm gonna
get going.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: TAISHIIIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Gah?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You again! Learn to dial down that<n>defeaning voice
of yours!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sorry! But I really...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Reeeaaally wanna have ascrimmage with you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket's unstoppable<n>enthusiasm
practically teleports us to<n>the racecourse.

I had wanted Narita Taishin to take it<n>easy since
she was done training for<n>the day, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Stop worrying so much. It's just a<n>scrimmage.
I've got enough energy<n>left for one more.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Anyway...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ticket might be the biggest dum-dum<n>in the world...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But the way she puts her heart and<n>soul into the
Derby is the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think it'd be worthwhile to<n>see what
she can do?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin! I'm ready—let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll be back.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Ka-chak!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The scrimmage between Narita<n>Taishin and
Winning Ticket begins!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's a 2,400-meter run on turf, the<n>same as the
Japanese Derby.<n>Winning Ticket is pushing hard
from<n>the get-go.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be on the offensive as<n>she races
down the track.
Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Once they enter the final straight,<n>Winning Ticket
releases a fearsome<n>burst of speed.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You're not gonna get the better of<n>me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's just as unrelenting.<n>Her last
sprint is as amazing as<n>ever—or rather, it's gotten
more fierce<n>since the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In the last 200 meters, Narita Taishin<n>manages to
push her nose ahead of<n>Winning Ticket for a
moment, but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Derby! Derby, Derby, Deeerrrbyyy!

I won't let you take the Derby crown<n>away from
meee!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Agh!
The dust clears...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket manages to claw back<n>the lead and
win the scrimmage by a<n>nose.

text_block_list.name: The Two
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Huff... Phew! Thank you,Taishiiin!
Sigh. Who thanks their opponentafter royally thrashing them? Way totick me off.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I managed to win today, but<n>you know
what?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I was only able to do it because I saw<n>you race at
the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You really are amazing, Taishin!<n>You're
super-duper strong! But<n>that's why I gotta get
strong too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I need to become strong enough to<n>beat you if I
wanna fulfill my dream<n>and become a Derby
champion!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
When I train, all I think about is<n>beating you—about
winning no matter<n>what!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Then you must be happy with<n>your win
today.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Not at all! This wasn't the realDerby, and I only barely won.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Besides! You're totally gonna get<n>even faster by
the time the Derby<n>comes around!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No duh.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah! That's why I gotta, gotta,gotta train more too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Later, Taishiiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
How can she still run like that? Where<n>does she
keep all that energy?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you were watching, right? You<n>saw how fast
Ticket was?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Good. I'll see you at tomorrow's<n>meeting.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
We've gotta come up with a training<n>regimen to
defeat her!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
To challenge and be challenged—they<n>push each
other further ahead.<n>Having a rival who so
earnestly<n>pursues her dream is a great<n>influence
on Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: At least, that's what I thought.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah! Deeerbyyyyy!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Just a dream, huh...
